text:
36 = LTC dispensing, outside short cycle, determined to be Part D after originally submitted to another 
payer 
42 = The prescriber ID submitted has been validated and is active (rarely populated) 
43 = For the prescriber ID submitted, the associated DEA number has been renewed or the renewal is 
in progress (rarely populated) 
44 = (Unknown value — rarely populated) 
45 = For the prescriber ID submitted, the associated DEA number is a valid hospital DEA number with 
suffix (rarely populated)
